name: Gwalior Fort
description: Described by Emperor Babur as 'the pearl among fortresses in India', this massive hill fort houses stunning palaces, temples, and rock-cut Jain statues.
history: The fort's history dates back to the 6th century. It has been ruled by many dynasties including the Tomars, Mughals, and Scindias.
famousFor: Man Mandir Palace, Sas Bahu Temple, and Teli Ka Mandir.
